description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance racing coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear wing for downforce. The body is adorned with a blue, white, and silver livery featuring various sponsor logos such as Nokia and Racingmade.de, giving it a professional motorsport appearance. The car has exposed front and rear suspension components, large racing slick tires, and a single-seat cockpit with a visible roll hoop behind the driver. The front features a pointed nose cone and a wide front wing, while the rear is dominated by a large diffuser and a multi-element rear wing. The side profile reveals sculpted side pods and air intakes, emphasizing its racing pedigree. Overall, the car is designed for speed and agility, typical of a Formula-style racing vehicle.
description: A blue, white, and silver racing coupe car with sponsor logos, large rear wing, and single-seat cockpit, designed for high-speed motorsport. Features exposed suspension, slick tires, and aerodynamic bodywork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose cone, wide front wing, and single-seat cockpit with roll hoop.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the aerodynamic side pods, sponsor logos, and large rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the multi-element rear wing, diffuser, and exposed rear suspension.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible air intakes, sponsor decals, and racing tires.
